text: Welcome to the community! We're excited to have you as a moderator. Your verified status and helpful nature will be a great asset.
Welcome aboard! As an event helper, you'll play a key role in making our community events successful. Glad to have you!
Welcome! As a mentor, you'll be guiding and supporting others. Your verified status and experience make you perfect for this role.
Welcome to the community! We're happy to have you here as a new member. Feel free to ask questions and get involved!
